title: Fix a bug whose symptom and cause live in different modules
task: `npm test` currently fails: checkout totals come out wrong. The failing test is test/checkout.test.js, but the root cause is not necessarily in the file the test imports. Find the bug and fix it at its source — do not paper over it at the call site, and do NOT modify any file under test/. Run the tests to verify.
notes: The bug lives in src/discount.js (percent treated as a fraction multiplier). file_not_contains proves the cause file was fixed rather than compensated for in src/checkout.js; the file_contains pin stops a test rewrite.
